nasb.text: Who say to a tree, ‘You are my father,’ And to a stone, ‘You gave me birth.’ For they have turned their back to Me, And not their face; But in the time of their trouble they will say, ‘Arise and save us.’

esv.text: who say to a tree, ‘You are my father,’ and to a stone, ‘You gave me birth.’ For they have turned their back to me, and not their face. But in the time of their trouble they say, ‘Arise and save us!’

cnv.text: 他們對木頭說：‘你是我爸爸’； 對石頭說：‘你是生我的’。 他們以背向我， 不以臉向我； 然而遭遇患難時卻說： ‘起來，救救我們吧！’

ccb.text: 你们认木头为父， 认石头为母。 你们不是面向我而是背对我， 危难时却向我求救。
